name: LaTeX (TeX Live)
description: Installs TeX Live from a pinned tlnet-final snapshot (scheme-basic plus selectable collections) and puts the binaries on PATH.

version.description: TeX Live release year to install, from that year's tlnet-final snapshot via install-tl.

collections.description: Comma-separated TeX Live collections installed on top of scheme-basic. latexmk is in collection-binextra, biber in collection-bibtexextra.
